name: the installer plans cargo, go and gem tool provisioning without dropping them as uninstallable
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/install-toolchain.sh" --dry-run 2>e.txt; ok=1; for tc in cargo go gem; do if command -v "$tc" >/dev/null 2>&1; then grep -q "$tc install" e.txt || ok=0; fi; done; [ "$ok" -eq 1 ] && echo installer-covers-cargo-go-gem 1>&2
